posts.text: Kevin Warsh has, in what is “YMCA” to Donald Trump’s ears, called for a “regime change” at the Federal Reserve. But a closer look hints at a much more modest project at the central bank https://www.economist.com/finance-and-economics/2026/04/26/will-kevin-warsh-trumpify-the-federal-reserve?taid=69eff3d534a71c00018aa48b&utm_campaign=trueanthem&utm_medium=social&utm_source=twitter
posts.author: TheEconomist

posts.text:
American economic confidence is now below April 2020 levels:

The Gallup Economic Confidence Index declined -11 points in April, to -38, the lowest reading since November 2023.

This is now below the pandemic low of -33 points seen in April 2020.

To put this into perspective, the all-time high was +56 points in January 2000, while the all-time low was -72 points in October 2008.

Currently, 73% of Americans believe the economy is getting worse, the highest since May 2023, while only 23% believe it is getting better.

Furthermore, only 33% of Americans say it is a good time to find a quality job, the lowest reading since January 2021, down from a peak of 74% in October 2021.

Americans are very concerned about the economy.
posts.author: KobeissiLetter

$MOLY Today we announce a pre-approval for €50 million from the EIC Step Up program, which is part of Horizon Europe, the European Union key funding program.
